layman_headline: Fear grips the crypto market — no strong swing trade setups today, patience is the play.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a fearful state with Bitcoin dominance high at 56.7%, meaning money is flowing away from altcoins and into Bitcoin. Most of the swing trade candidates are either too risky (meme coins that crashed 100%), too extended after massive pumps (BCAP up 363%), or showing bearish chart patterns. Ethereum is the strongest candidate with a bullish Three White Soldiers candle pattern and decent risk/reward, but it's still in a broader downtrend and the market mood doesn't support an aggressive entry right now.
layman_action: Wait on the sidelines. If Ethereum pulls back to around $1,850 and holds that level with volume, that could be a better entry point. Don't chase anything in this fearful market.
expert_reasoning: The candidate pool this cycle is exceptionally weak. BCAP (+363%) has no technical data and is clearly overextended. GROK shows -100% change which signals a token collapse or data error — untradeable. BONK has an attractive RSI of 29 (oversold) but its chart bias is -0.70 with price below all MAs in a steep downtrend with -29.4% 5-day momentum, making it a falling knife. MON has a bullish engulfing candle and 2.87x R/R but is below all MAs with a neutral bias — not compelling enough. ETH stands out with a slightly bullish chart bias (+0.30), Three White Soldiers pattern, 2.55x risk/reward, and $1,900 support nearby. However, the broader market context — Fear index at 31, BTC dominance at 56.7% squeezing alts, and ETH still in a macro downtrend 62% off ATH — argues for patience rather than immediate entry. I'm setting this as HOLD with ETH as the top watchlist item, targeting a pullback entry near $1,850.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.7% continues to drain capital from altcoins including ETH
Fear & Greed at 31 could deteriorate further, causing another leg down across the market
ETH is still in a macro downtrend (-62% from ATH) — the bullish candle pattern could be a bear market rally
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,900 support — a confirmed bounce with volume would trigger a BUY signal
Fear & Greed index trend — if it climbs above 35-40 it would confirm improving sentiment for an entry
BTC dominance — any pullback below 55% would signal rotation into alts and improve the ETH thesis
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear-driven consolidation phase with BTC at $64,966 and dominance elevated at 56.7%. Altcoins are broadly weak, and the Fear & Greed index at 31 is improving from last week's 28.3 but still signals caution.
context_banner: Market fear and high BTC dominance create a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades — discipline demands waiting for a cleaner setup.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 31 (Fear) with improving trend from 28.3 weekly avg — not yet bullish enough to justify aggressive entries but trajectory is positive.
BONK RSI at 29 is deeply oversold but in a severe downtrend (-29.4% 5-day), making it a falling knife rather than a bounce play.
ETH Three White Soldiers pattern with 2.55x risk/reward is the best technical setup in the candidate pool, supporting it as the top watchlist item.
ETH derivatives reset narrative from Blockworks suggests positioning is cleaning up, which often precedes directional moves higher.
Goldman Sachs CEO backing the CLARITY Act and crypto contributing $55B to US economy signals institutional legitimacy, broadly supportive for majors like ETH.
